signup.title: Create Account
signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.checkEmail: Check your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.continueInTab: Continue in the tab that just opened to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated. You can now log in with your new password.

logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
logout.activeSessionMessage: If you log out, your current workout progress will be lost.
